violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, they are in the process of taking the class. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Sink and surface sanitizer solution was in excess of 704-1875 parts per million (ppm). Sink and surface sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC diluted with water to adequate PPM. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area(broken reach-in unit.) Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Equipment must be repaired or removed from premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Milk was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. According to the food temp log, the cooler was 38 degrees at 8:30 am. Food was relocated to other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The milk cooler was unable to hold food temperatures under 41 degrees. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Unit to not be used until serviced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area(broken reach-in unit.) Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Equipment must be repaired or removed from premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floor drains in the kitchen area were observed to have standing water (with an odor). Per the PIC, the floor drains back-up with water to floor level when draining the steamer unit and/or mopping and are slow to drain. The Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2023

The kitchen area was observed to have equipment that is no longer used for the daily operations. The PREMISES shall be free of items that are unnecessary to the operation or maintenance of the establishment such as EQUIPMENT that is nonfunctional or no longer used. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023
